title: Squonk's Elemental Wands
description: Adds elemental wands to minecraft with their own special secondary items!
body:
This mod adds elemental wands to minecraft with craftable secondary items!

IMPORTANT - These wands can NOT BE ACCESSED IN SURVIVAL MODE for reasons such as i dont want people crafting multiple wands...

There are four wands:
Earth Wand, 
Wind Wand, 
Fire Wand, 
and the Water Wand.

Earth wand requires 2 cobblestone to use and when you swing it it suffocates all nearby entities in rock.


Wind wand when toggled(swung) will telekinesis nearby entities to where you are looking. For every 2 hearts, you can telekinesis one mob.


Water wand requires 1 water bucket to use and when swung will fill the surrounding area with water and any mob in the water will be electrocuted by the "invisible lightning."


Lava wand requires 1 lava bucket and when you swing it a pit of lava will open up in the ground and a block will be placed beneath you so that you are safe.

All wands give passive affects when held.

Secondary items: (CAN BE CRAFTED)
Dry Ice Sword does 11 attack damage and when a mob is hit with it that mob will be suffocated in ice.


Earth Pickaxe will mine a 5x5 area around the player and can even break bedrock!


Wind Tele Blaster will blast an ender pearl at questionable speed wherever you are looking.


Flamethrower will summon a ray of lava wherever you are looking.

Enjoy!
